description: - BioNTech paid Hospital of University of Pennsylvania **$1.2 billion** in 10 royalty payments (2021-2022)
- **March 22, 2013**: DARPA awards Moderna **~$1.4 million** for "modified RNA technology for production of antibodies for immune prophylaxis"
- **October 2, 2013**: DARPA awards Moderna **up to $25 million** under ADEPT-PROTECT program
